summary: Integrated ADR 0233 on top of repo release 0.177.51 by replaying `make converge-gitea` from the rebased merged-main candidate, seeding a durable repository token for private release-asset replay, completing the private Gitea release-bundle publication path, and re-verifying the published private assets from the controller with Cosign.

verification.observed: `make converge-gitea` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0233-main-merge` with final recap `docker-build-lv3 ok=100 changed=5 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=227 changed=2 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=24 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=36 changed=4 failed=0` while preserving the latest `origin/main` merge base.

verification.check: Private release-bundle publication and verification workflow
verification.observed: The private Gitea push for branch head `2fb56c14b62a73d0de47cb367a78c987dfd257c5` completed successful workflow run `68`, where job `85` (`publish`) ran from `2026-03-28T21:05:02Z` to `2026-03-28T21:05:10Z` and job `86` (`verify`) ran from `2026-03-28T21:05:12Z` to `2026-03-28T21:05:17Z`. A paired `validate` workflow run `69` also completed `success` for job `87` from `2026-03-28T21:05:04Z` to `2026-03-28T21:05:08Z`.

verification.check: Published asset set and manifest provenance
verification.observed: Release `10` for tag `bundle-branch-codex-ws-0233-main-merge-2fb56c14b62a` published the bundle tarball, checksum, and Sigstore bundle. The verification replay reported manifest fields `repository: ops/platform_server`, `ref_name: codex/ws-0233-main-merge`, `ref_type: branch`, `commit: 2fb56c14b62a73d0de47cb367a78c987dfd257c5`, and `file_count: 1930`.

verification.check: Controller-side private asset replay with Cosign
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/release_bundle.py verify-release --gitea-url http://10.10.10.20:3003 --repository ops/platform_server --release-tag bundle-branch-codex-ws-0233-main-merge-2fb56c14b62a --output-dir /tmp/lv3-release-bundle-verify-main-0233 --public-key-path keys/gitea-release-bundle-cosign.pub --api-token "$GITEA_TOKEN" --cosign-path .tmp/bin/cosign-darwin` succeeded with `release_url: http://git.example.com:3009/ops/platform_server/releases/tag/bundle-branch-codex-ws-0233-main-merge-2fb56c14b62a` and `bundle_sha256: da9139777eadf4d0a6f4b520decc40781fb13282486ef67326217990e6223a8f`.

notes: The earlier branch-local receipt remains preserved as the first isolated-worktree publication proof, but this merged-main-equivalent receipt is the canonical source for recording ADR 0233 in repo version 0.177.52 and platform version 0.130.43.

The integrated release step that follows this receipt updates `VERSION`, `RELEASE.md`, `changelog.md`, `docs/release-notes/*`, `README.md`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the ADR and workstream metadata to record signed release bundles as live platform truth.
